summary_en: 24,342,202 shares (13.1% of issued capital) to be cancelled effective 2026-05-29. Post-cancellation issued capital: 161,102,570 shares; treasury shares: 16,110,257 shares.
title_en: Notice Regarding Cancellation of Treasury Shares (Share Cancellation under the Companies Act Article 178)
translation_en_brief: On 2026-05-15, Credit Saison's board of directors resolved to cancel 24,342,202 treasury shares under the Companies Act Article 178. The cancellation represents 13.1% of issued capital and is scheduled to take effect on 2026-05-29. The company cited progress under its 2024-2026 medium-term business plan, financial outlook, and share price conditions as the basis for this capital policy measure. Following cancellation, issued capital will total 161,102,570 shares and treasury holdings will be 16,110,257 shares.
